MODEL A PIPELINE (CPU · INDEPENDENT OF vLLM)
DuckDB → sliding windows (64x8) per IP pair
Threshold calibration: μ+3σ on eval set
All evals pass → merge · Any fail → halt + retrain failing track
04_merge → SHA-384 sign → 05_serve (atomic symlink) → vLLM hot-reload | Model A: systemd restart
ZERO STATE -- ATTACK SURFACE RETURNED TO ZERO
Only forensic artifacts persist. All containers, databases, contexts, and secrets destroyed.

PHASE 1 (11 Data Sources) → PHASE 2 (Ingress/Fan-Out) → PHASE 3 (Detection + Model A Baseline) → PHASE 4 (TI RAG + 5-Agent Swarm) → PHASE 5 (Operator/Containment) → PHASE 6 (8-Track MLOps + TurboVec) → ZERO STATE
